step_rationale: Synthesizes histamine; regulates platelet and inflammatory thromboinflammatory responses.
mechanism: HDC catalyzes histamine synthesis, modulating platelet activation and plaque inflammation in atherothrombotic disease.

references.title: Histamine deficiency facilitates coronary microthrombosis after myocardial infarction by increasing neutrophil-platelet interactions.
references.journal: Journal of cellular and molecular medicine
